channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Cut cloud carbon 30% without slowing APIs
item.description: Cut API carbon 38% without adding latency or cost — PostgreSQL 16 tuning, ARM servers, Rust refactor, and energy-aware routing with concrete numbers and code examples.

item.title: Instrument LLM pipelines: 5 observability must-haves
item.description: at caused 40% of their errors. This guide f with LLMs — production in two weeks.

item.title: Dev platform under $2k: how we did it
item.description: Cut dev platform costs 67% and deploy time 91% — how we built an internal platform on $360/month that handled 3G drops without losing state. Includes CLI code, Traefik configs, and ROI numbers.

item.title: Senior devs flee big tech’s hidden drag
item.description: Expose 60% more outages before they hit production — add Prometheus metrics to any service in under 2 hours. observability gaps senior engineers

item.title: Scan your repo, train your AI
item.description: Cut onboarding time 71% with repository intelligence — GitHub Copilot Workspace 2026, Sourcegraph 2026, and CodeRabbit 2026 compared with real latency and cost data.

item.title: Edge functions: what actually works in 2026
item.description: promised 40% faster responses worldwide. A with Edge functions — move a high-traffic REST API from AWS Lambda in us-.

item.title: Monoliths win again: 8 reasons why 2026 favors one big
item.description: ound that 78% of the latency came from inte with Monoliths again reasons favors — be a single misconfigured timeout — this post is wh.

item.title: AI impact: measure velocity — not just vibes
item.description: Cut AI tool bloat 40% with GitHub Copilot audit — commit caps, artifact size limits, and the rework trap most teams miss in 2026

item.title: Bust the pool size myth for 2026
item.description: Reduce database p99 latency 60% by fixing connection pool sizing — the outdated CPU-core heuristic costs teams $18k/month in RDS over-provisioning and adds 2x tail latency. Learn the metrics that matter.

item.title: Pick PostgreSQL in 2026, here's why
item.description: Cut p99 latency 63% and deadlocks to zero by choosing PostgreSQL in 2026 — schema, indexes, and connection pooling that actually work under load.

item.title: RAG in prod: hidden failure modes
item.description: Cut RAG token costs 63% and latency 97%—the real levers most tutorials skip: atomic indexes, cache guards, and prompt truncation. Learn from the failures we fixed in production.

item.title: Avoid 429s: Rate limit without breaking clients
item.description: Cut 429 errors 40x and support tickets 30x with adaptive backpressure — the rate-limiting pattern that keeps clients running instead of breaking them.

item.title: 70-hour weeks to sustainable freelancing
item.description: Cut freelance burnout 70% with sustainable workload, context batching, and platform detox — real tools, real metrics, and the contract clause that actually works.

item.title: Trust small teams, not zero-trust
item.description: Cut security overhead 80% with contextual trust — latency benchmarks, cost data, and the zero-trust mistakes small teams keep making in 2026

item.title: AI salaries 2026: PyTorch vs TensorFlow payoff
item.description: PyTorch vs TensorFlow salaries in 2026 revealed — real benchmark data, hiring trends, and the 12% pay gap you can’t ignore. See who pays more and why.

item.title: AI apps break first: patterns that survive
item.description: Reduce AI app latency 79% and costs 75% with per-user Redis caching, idempotency keys, and LiteLLM fallbacks — the boring stack that holds up in production.

item.title: Vector DBs vs PostgreSQL 16: the exact cutoff
item.description: Cut vector search latency 60% and monthly cloud costs 86% by switching from Milvus 2.4 to PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector 0.7.0 — benchmark data, index tuning, and the one metric that matters.

item.title: Pick the Right Real-Time Protocol
item.description: Cut API latency 75%: benchmark WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling with exact latency, memory, and cost figures for 2026

item.title: Ace remote interviews without a CS degree
item.description: Ace remote tech interviews without a CS degree — real trade-offs, not just LeetCode drills. Learn the mental model that works in 2026.

item.title: How much freelancers charge 2026
item.description: 2026 freelance developer rates: exact numbers for $50, $100, and $150/hour — includes hidden costs, tax math, and a Python calculator you can reuse today
